texto: Our hopes of avoiding the fate which threatens must...[be to make]adjustments that will be needed if we are to recover and surpass our former standards...and only if every one of us is ready to individually obey the necessities of readjustment shall we be able to get through a difficult period as free men who can choose their own way of life. Let a uniform minimum be secured to everybody by all means
autor: but let us admit at the same time that with this assurance of a basic minimum all claims for a privileged security for particular classes must lapse....
explicacao: Orientação direta de but let us admit at the same time that with this assurance of a basic minimum all claims for a privileged security for particular classes must lapse.... sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “Our hopes of avoiding the fate which threatens must...[be to make]adjustments that will be needed…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, friedrich-a-hayek, the-road-to-serfdom, útil em momentos de viagem e the-road-to-serfdom.
